arts.ttl: ‘He put a knife in my back’ – Florian Thauvin opens up about his feud with Dimitri Payet
arts.sum: A longstanding feud between two French footballers and former teammates is being revisited. Florian Thauvin (31) and Dimitri Payet (37) played together at Olympique de Marseille from 2013 to 2015…

The American forward, Christian Pulisic, is going through a good time in his career, which he is also bringing to the USMNT, where he is an undisputed leader under the new management of Mauricio Pochettino. Pulisic is also the only Rossoneri player in the top five scorers in Italian football so far this season.

arts.ttl: Christian Pulisic called out for USA exit as Mauricio Pochettino urged to take action
arts.sum: Christian Pulisic left the USMNT camp early after captaining the side to victory over Panama, with the AC Milan winger deciding to return to Italy ahead of the defeat to Mexico
